parties.name: WOOLFE, PHILLIP, TRUSTOR, TESTAMENTARY TRUST , JUL 8, 2014

calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Testamentary Trust From Continuing Jurisdiction Of The Court (Probate Code 17352)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Byrne for (trustee) Francine Woolfe.

Mr. Byrne stated that he filed a petition to remove the trust from court jurisdiction, that the examiner states that it is not under court supervision, that they will not be filing an accounting, that he wanted this hearing as he has 2 other cases in the same situation, that there is a stamp on the orders indicating when accountings are due and asked if they go off of court supervision after that accounting. The Court stated that it cannot respond on a matter that is not before it. The petition to remove testamentary trust from continuing court supervision was denied.

Judge: Paul Alvarado Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Saephan (Not Reported)

First Count And Report; Petition For Approval Of Account; For Allowance Of Attorney'S Fees; For Waiver Of Trustee'S Fees; And Waiver Of Accounting
